name: Blister
description: Epic Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, built around Fuel the Blood, Blood Overdrive, and Blood Bath. Extends grenade capacity and kill skill duration.
notes: If this mod pushes you above your normal grenade limit, any extra grenades are lost when you unequip it. It originally boosted Boiling Blood rather than Blood Bath, which was corrected in the 25 September hotfix and later rolled into Patch 1.8 (11 February 2014).

special.description: At max level, adds +6 grenade capacity and +66% kill skill duration. Most kill skills last 7 seconds, extending to about 11.6 seconds with this mod. Affected skills include Blood Bath, Blood Overdrive, Blood Twitch, Fuel the Blood, Fuel the Fire, and Nervous Blood.
